summary: Comprehensive testing of Kurry Leaf website with 7 fixes. All backend tests pass (14/14). All frontend features verified. Fixed critical bug: 'Leave a Review on Google' button was hidden by Emergent branding CSS due to full URL containing 'emergentagent.com'. Changed to relative URL '/api/reviews/redirect'.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Leave a Review button was hidden by CSS rule targeting a[href*='emergentagent.com']. Changed REVIEW_REDIRECT from full URL to relative '/api/reviews/redirect'
All 7 requested fixes verified working: Reviews section, Google Maps, QR section removed, Gallery enhanced, Mobile keyboard fix CSS present, New logo, Mobile responsiveness
seed_data_creation: None required - Backend returns curated fallback data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kurry Leaf restaurant website fully tested. Key fix applied: ReviewsSection.jsx REVIEW_REDIRECT changed from full URL to relative '/api/reviews/redirect' to avoid Emergent branding CSS hiding the button. All features working: Reviews (4.0 rating, 108 reviews), Google Maps embed with fallback button, Gallery with enhanced styling (rounded-xl, shadow-lg, gradient overlay, glassmorphism, zoom hover), Lightbox, New logo (job_ac65c625), Mobile responsive at 375px and 320px. QR section successfully removed.

reviews_section.rating_summary: PASS - Shows 4.0 rating with 108 Google Reviews

contact_section.open_in_google_maps_btn: PASS - Visible with correct href and target='_blank'
contact_section.contact_form_fields: PASS - All data-testids present (name, phone, message, submit)

gallery_section.enhanced_styling: PASS - rounded-xl, shadow-lg, gradient overlay, glassmorphism, zoom hover
gallery_section.lightbox: PASS - Opens on click, closes on X button

features_tested.qr_section_removed: PASS - data-testid='google-qr-section' not found in DOM

mobile_responsiveness.375px: PASS - All sections visible, no horizontal scroll, Leave a Review button visible
mobile_responsiveness.320px: PASS - All sections visible, no horizontal scroll

backend_api.reviews_google: PASS - Returns rating 4.0, 108 total reviews, 8 review objects
backend_api.reviews_redirect: PASS - Returns 302 redirect to Google review URL

mocked_apis_note: MOCKED: Google Places API (backend returns curated fallback data). Cart/ordering uses frontend localStorage.
